# Regression test for dormant annotation tracking.
#
# Places an abstract annotation whose region id matches no existing
# region. The build_abstract_vertex_lookup pass will not find a
# vertex for the lookup key, so the annotation should be reported
# as dormant in ParkingLayout.dormant_annotations.

polygon outer
0,0
400,0
400,300
0,300
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stalls_per_face=4
----
set stalls_per_face=4

debug use_abstract_stamp=true
----
debug use_abstract_stamp=true

# Single-region lot, so the real region id is 0x1000000000000.
# Intentionally point this annotation at a fake region id so the
# lookup misses and it ends up dormant.
annotation abstract-delete-vertex region=0xdeadbeef x=-3 y=3
----
annotation abstract-delete-vertex region=0x00000000deadbeef x=-3 y=3

generate
----
total_stalls: 162

# Should report one dormant annotation (index 0).
dormant
----
dormant_annotations: 1 (0)

# Sanity: add another annotation with the real region id so the
# total count grows but only one is dormant.
annotation abstract-delete-vertex region=0x1000000000000 x=-3 y=3
----
annotation abstract-delete-vertex region=0x0001000000000000 x=-3 y=3

generate
----
total_stalls: 170

dormant
----
dormant_annotations: 1 (0)

screenshot
----
